label: PCI DSS 4.0 Compliance
description: Governs agent operations handling cardholder data (CHD) and sensitive authentication data (SAD). Enforces network security, access controls, encryption, and monitoring per PCI DSS v4.0.

controls.description: Network security controls restrict inbound/outbound traffic
Non-console admin access encrypted with strong cryptography

policy_rules.reason: PCI 2.2.7: CHD must use encrypted transmission

policy_rules.condition: data_class == CHD AND egress_destination NOT IN cardholder_data_env

controls.description: Access control system covering all system components
All user access authenticated with strong mechanism

policy_rules.condition: data_class IN [CHD, SAD] AND privilege_tier < ELEVATED

policy_rules.reason: PCI 8.3.1: payment operations require strong authentication

controls.description: Audit logs capture all individual access to CHD
Audit logs reviewed at least daily

policy_rules.reason: PCI 10.2.1: all CHD/SAD access must be logged
